main_examples.contract: [contract]{"subgoal":"Move to the kitchen","success_condition":"The agent is in the kitchen or has opened the path to reach it.","target_objects":["door","hallway","kitchen"],"action_guidance":["open door to hallway","go to hallway","open door to kitchen","go to kitchen"],"handoff_if":"complete when success_condition is met; need_replan if blocked"}[/contract]

[contract]{"subgoal":"Collect thermometer, metal pot","success_condition":"The needed object is in the agent inventory: thermometer, metal pot.","target_objects":["thermometer","cupboard","metal pot"],"action_guidance":["look around","pick up thermometer","open cupboard","pick up metal pot"],"handoff_if":"complete when success_condition is met; need_replan if blocked"}[/contract]

[contract]{"subgoal":"Operate drawer, cupboard, freezer","success_condition":"The relevant device, container, or door has been operated: drawer, cupboard, freezer.","target_objects":["drawer","cupboard","freezer","fridge"],"action_guidance":["look around","open drawer in cupboard","open freezer","open fridge"],"handoff_if":"complete when success_condition is met; need_replan if blocked"}[/contract]

[contract]{"subgoal":"Collect metal pot","success_condition":"The needed object is in the agent inventory: metal pot.","target_objects":["chocolate","metal pot","stove"],"action_guidance":["focus on chocolate","move chocolate to metal pot","pick up metal pot","move metal pot to stove"],"handoff_if":"complete when success_condition is met; need_replan if blocked"}[/contract]

[contract]{"subgoal":"Inspect chocolate","success_condition":"The agent has inspected chocolate and can use the observation for the next decision.","target_objects":["stove","chocolate","thermometer"],"action_guidance":["activate stove","examine chocolate","use thermometer in inventory on chocolate"],"handoff_if":"complete when success_condition is met; need_replan if blocked"}[/contract]

[contract]{"subgoal":"Inspect chocolate","success_condition":"The agent has inspected chocolate and can use the observation for the next decision.","target_objects":["thermometer","chocolate"],"action_guidance":["use thermometer in inventory on chocolate","examine chocolate"],"handoff_if":"complete when success_condition is met; need_replan if blocked"}[/contract]

[contract]{"subgoal":"Inspect chocolate","success_condition":"The agent has inspected chocolate and can use the observation for the next decision.","target_objects":["thermometer","chocolate"],"action_guidance":["use thermometer in inventory on chocolate","examine chocolate"],"handoff_if":"complete when success_condition is met; need_replan if blocked"}[/contract]
